PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/api/items/berries?page=1&limit=3" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Total berries: $\($_.meta.total\)"; $_.data | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "#$\($_.id\) $\($_.displayName\) | Gift: $\($_.naturalGiftType\) $\($_.naturalGiftPower\) | Firmness: $\($_.firmness\) | Flavors: $\($_.flavors | ForEach-Object {\\"$\($_.flavor.name\):$\($_.potency\)\\"} | Join-String -Separator ', '\)" } })

PowerShell(& "C:\\nodejs\\node.exe" "C:\\nodejs\\node_modules\\pm2\\bin\\pm2" restart pokedex-thailand 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/api/competitive?format=gen9ou&page=1&limit=3" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Month: $\($_.info.month\) | Battles: $\($_.info.battles\) | Total: $\($_.meta.total\)"; $_.data | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "#$\($_.rank\) $\($_.name\) $\($_.usage\)% | Item: $\($_.items[0].name\) $\($_.items[0].pct\)% | Move: $\($_.moves[0].name\) $\($_.moves[0].pct\)%" } })

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/api/competitive/great-tusk?format=gen9ou" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "=== $\($_.name\) | Usage: $\($_.usage\)% ==="; Write-Host "Items:"; $_.items | Select-Object -First 4 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.name\): $\($_.pct\)%" }; Write-Host "Moves:"; $_.moves | Select-Object -First 4 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.name\): $\($_.pct\)%" }; Write-Host "Teammates:"; $_.teammates | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.name\): $\($_.pct\)%" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/api/competitive/kingambit?format=gen9ou" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "=== $\($_.name\) $\($_.usage\)% ==="; Write-Host "Items top 4:"; $_.items | Select-Object -First 4 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.name\) $\($_.pct\)%" }; Write-Host "Moves top 4:"; $_.moves | Select-Object -First 4 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.name\) $\($_.pct\)%" }; Write-Host "Teammates:"; $_.teammates | Select-Object -First 4 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.name\) $\($_.pct\)%" }; Write-Host "Spreads:"; $_.spreads | Select-Object -First 2 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.nature\) $\($_.pct\)% EVs: $\($_.evs | Out-String -Width 80\)" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/api/competitive/kingambit?format=gen9ou" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "=== $\($_.name\) $\($_.usage\)% ==="; Write-Host "Items:"; $_.items | Select-Object -First 4 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.name\) $\($_.pct\)%" }; Write-Host "Moves:"; $_.moves | Select-Object -First 4 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.name\) $\($_.pct\)%" }; Write-Host "Teammates:"; $_.teammates | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.name\) slug=$\($_.slug\) $\($_.pct\)%" } } } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })
